title: Caloric restriction extends ovarian lifespan via SIRT1-mediated autophagy in mice
phenotype: increased primordial follicle reserve at 12 months
endpoint: follicle count, FSH levels, fertility rate
relevance_to_menopause_delay: Dietary restriction preserves the follicle pool, potentially delaying menopause onset by slowing follicular atresia
translational_caveat: Mouse estrous cycle differs from human menstrual cycle; sustained 30% caloric restriction is not clinically feasible
